_meta._note: Scaffold copy drafted in T3 for the PDPA consent banner. Live site has no equivalent banner today; all strings here are drafted (_draft: true) and to be refined in T12.

banner.heading: Your data choices
banner.body: We collect a little information to make this site work well for you. Choose what's OK.

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site to work — your language choice, text size, and these consent settings.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous counts of pages viewed and buttons clicked. Helps us improve the site.

personalization.label: Personalization
personalization.description: Your answers to the 'tell us about your child' prompt. This includes sensitive personal data; explicit consent only.

chatbot.label: Chat history
chatbot.description: Keep your chat transcripts between visits. Off = session only.
